headline: UBS Raises its Price Target on Digital Realty Trust (DLR) to $227
summary: Digital Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE:DLR) is one of the 10 Best Edge Computing Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 24, 2026, UBS raised the price target on Digital Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE:DLR) to $227 from $225 and maintained a Buy rating, citing continued momentum from AI-driven demand across both hyperscale and enterprise customers. Similarly, […]
